# Costa Rica Here and Now — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An interactive Costa Rica adventure guide designed for three traveler profiles — solo explorers, couples, and families. The guide offers curated itineraries spanning 5, 7, and 10 days, with entry points from both San José (SJO) and Liberia airports. It embraces the full geographic diversity of Costa Rica, including the often-overlooked Caribbean coast, and aims to deliver a dynamic, easy-to-navigate planning experience that feels adventurous yet approachable.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://costa-rica-here-and-now.zappy5.app
Unleash your wild side with Costa Rica adventure itineraries built for solo explorers, couples, and families. Discover 5, 7, and 10-day trips from San José or Liberia. Start your journey now!

### Traveler Profiles
https://costa-rica-here-and-now.zappy5.app/traveler-profiles
Whether you roam alone, with a partner, or the whole crew, match your travel style to the perfect Costa Rica experience. Dive into curated profiles and plan boldly today.

### Itineraries
https://costa-rica-here-and-now.zappy5.app/itineraries
Browse dynamic 5, 7, and 10-day Costa Rica itineraries for every traveler. From the Caribbean coast to volcanic peaks, grab your ideal route and book the adventure of a lifetime.

### Regions & Routes
https://costa-rica-here-and-now.zappy5.app/regions-routes
Go beyond the usual with routes spanning Costa Rica&#39;s full geographic diversity, including the hidden Caribbean coast. Map your adventure and travel deeper than ever before.

### Contact
https://costa-rica-here-and-now.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to turn daydreams into a Costa Rica adventure? Contact our team to customize your journey, ask questions, or get local tips. Your epic escape starts with a single message.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://costa-rica-here-and-now.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://costa-rica-here-and-now.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Costa Rica Here and Now
An interactive Costa Rica adventure guide designed for three traveler profiles — solo explorers, couples, and families. The guide offers curated itineraries spanning 5, 7, and 10 days, with entry points from both San José (SJO) and Liberia airports. It embraces the full geographic diversity of Costa Rica, including the often-overlooked Caribbean coast, and aims to deliver a dynamic, easy-to-navigate planning experience that feels adventurous yet approachable.

## Target Audience
- solo travelers, couples, and families looking for adventures in Costa Rica
- Adventure Solo Travelers
- Couples Adventure Seekers
- Family Explorers

## Industry
Travel & Tourism

---

- Robots: https://costa-rica-here-and-now.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://costa-rica-here-and-now.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
